label: Vector databases & ANN indexes

node.label: Vector databases & ANN indexes
node.definition: A vector database stores embeddings with metadata and supports approximate-nearest-neighbor indexing, filtering, updates, replication, and retrieval at operational scale.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Vector databases & ANN indexes is modeled as depending on Dense vector retrieval, Databases & information retrieval and feeding downstream nodes such as Vector-search and retrieval services.
examples: atlas downstream link to Vector-search and retrieval services
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Dense vector retrieval, Databases & information retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: Vector databases & ANN indexes stores, selects, or obtains information through Dense vector retrieval.

In this atlas graph, Vector databases & ANN indexes has a `uses` dependency on Databases & information retrieval because Databases & information retrieval is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Vector databases & ANN indexes has a `uses` dependency on Distributed systems & networking because Distributed systems & networking is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
